description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and body, giving it a highly distorted and surreal appearance. The head is relatively normal in proportion, with facial features clearly visible, while the arms and legs are stretched and twisted in unnatural directions. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted top and pants, with the clothing tightly following the contours of the elongated body. The hands and feet are also distorted, with the lower limbs looping and curving in a way that defies typical human anatomy. The overall form is slender and abstract, with a smooth surface finish and minimal textural detail. The asset is visually striking due to its unusual proportions and the dynamic, flowing lines of the limbs.
description: A highly distorted adult human figure with elongated, twisted limbs and a smooth, fitted outfit. The head is proportionate, but the body and limbs are stretched in surreal, abstract forms.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face and upper torso, with the arms and legs dramatically elongated and curving away from the body.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the extreme length of the limbs and the profile of the head, with the body stretched horizontally.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the head and the twisted, looping lower limbs, emphasizing the abstract form.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the head in profile and the extended limbs, with the body appearing almost suspended.
attribute_posture: twisted and elongated, with limbs extended in abstract directions
